query: List the five municipalities in Finnmark county with the highest number of buildings in 200-year flood zones, sorted by count descending.

1.description: inspect distinct gjentaksintervall values in flomareal

2.description: get Finnmark fylke geometry and fylkesnummer

3.description: get flomareal rows for 200-year return period (gjentaksintervall=200) with geometry column

4.description: reduce 200-year flomareal to Finnmark by intersecting with fylke geometry

5.description: get building id, kommunenummer, kommunenavn and representasjonspunkt geometry for all buildings (will be spatially filtered)

6.description: find buildings that intersect the Finnmark 200-year flood zones

7.description: count distinct buildings per kommunenummer and kommunenavn

8.description: sort municipalities by building count descending
